title: The Story of Doctor Dolittle
description: The Story of Doctor Dolittle — knowledge fragments for AI agents

memes.label: About This Wiki
memes.description: A knowledge wiki for "The Story of Doctor Dolittle" — this page is auto-generated from book metadata

memes.label: 'Table of Contents'
memes.description: 'Table of Contents'

memes.label: Africa (Expedition Destination)
memes.description: The African continent serves as the primary setting for Doctor Dolittle's expedition to cure a devastating monkey sickness, traversed by sea, jungle, and mountain.

memes.label: Animal Language
memes.description: The ability of Doctor Dolittle to understand and speak with animals in their own tongues — the central premise of the story — taught to him by his parrot Polynesia and enabling all his subsequent adventures.

memes.label: Animal Reference Index
memes.description: Every animal character in The Story of Doctor Dolittle, ranked by cross-reference count — Polynesia the parrot, Chee-Chee the monkey, Jip the dog, and the creatures of field and jungle.

memes.label: Barbary Coast
memes.description: The dangerous coastal region of North Africa where the Barbary pirates operate, and where Doctor Dolittle's return voyage encounters Ben Ali and his pirate crew.

memes.label: Before the King
memes.description: Doctor Dolittle and his animals are summoned to appear before the King of the Jolliginki, a tense audience that results in their imprisonment and sets up the central conflict of the African chapters.

memes.label: Ben Ali
memes.description: The fearsome pirate leader known as the Barbary Dragon, who commands a crew along the Barbary Coast and whose encounter with Doctor Dolittle results in a transformative defeat.

memes.label: Black Rappee
memes.description: A dark, pungent variety of snuff tobacco — Doctor Dolittle's preferred snuff and the key to Jip's extraordinary feat of tracking the missing fisherman across the open ocean by scent alone.

memes.label: Canary Islands
memes.description: A real Atlantic archipelago that serves as a waypoint on Doctor Dolittle's return voyage from Africa, marked by Dab-Dab the duck's recognition and the Doctor's contemplative pause.

memes.label: Characters
memes.description: Complete index of characters in The Story of Doctor Dolittle — both human and animal, from the Doctor himself to Polynesia the parrot and the animals of Africa.

memes.label: Chee-Chee
memes.description: Doctor Dolittle's monkey, the most human-like of the Doctor's animal companions, who serves as cook, messenger, and the crucial link that initiates the African expedition.

memes.label: Chee-Chee Arrives with a Message
memes.description: On a cold December night, Chee-Chee the monkey arrives breathless with a swallow messenger bringing news of a terrible sickness among the monkeys of Africa, setting the Doctor's great journey into motion.

memes.label: Chief Chimpanzee
memes.description: A chimpanzee leader who presided over the Monkeys' Council in the African jungle, questioning why Doctor Dolittle wished to leave and marveling at the strange customs of Men (009-003, 009-015).

memes.label: Concepts
memes.description: Index of concepts, themes, and ideas explored in The Story of Doctor Dolittle — from animal language to the nature of kindness across species.

memes.label: Dab-Dab
memes.description: Doctor Dolittle's pet duck, a resourceful and practical member of the animal household who serves as a capable swimmer and diver during the African expedition.

memes.label: Doctor Dolittle, M.D.
memes.description: John Dolittle's professional qualification as a Doctor of Medicine (M.D.), which he earned treating people before becoming an animal-doctor.

memes.label: Doctor Dolittle's High Hat
memes.description: Doctor Dolittle's distinctive tall hat — an iconic accessory worn throughout his African expedition, a survival vessel for the stowaway white mouse during the shipwreck, and a visual symbol of his eccentric English character in foreign lands.

memes.label: Doctor's Garden
memes.description: The large garden surrounding Doctor Dolittle's small house on the edge of Puddleby-on-the-Marsh, serving as a gathering place and sanctuary for animals of all kinds.

memes.label: Entity Index
memes.description: Complete index of all entities in the wiki — people, animals, places, events, and concepts — ranked by cross-reference count for quick navigation.

memes.label: Escape from Prison
memes.description: Doctor Dolittle and his animals escape from the King of Jolliginki's strongest prison with the help of Prince Bumpo, who secretly frees them in exchange for a promise of transformation.

memes.label: Event Highlights
memes.description: The story's pivotal events ranked by cross-reference count — which adventures, discoveries, and turning points are referenced most throughout the wiki.

memes.label: Events
memes.description: Chronological index of all events in The Story of Doctor Dolittle, from Puddleby to the African expedition and return journey.

memes.label: Featured Content
memes.description: Curated showcase of the finest pages in the Doctor Dolittle wiki — featured and standard-quality entries ranked by cross-reference count, plus the most-connected entries across the entire wiki.

memes.label: Fifty-Acre Field
memes.description: A field near Puddleby-on-the-Marsh where the plow-horse works, noted in the story for its sun exposure that prompts the horse's request for green spectacles.

memes.label: Finding the Pushmi-Pullyu
memes.description: The monkeys of Africa organize a great hunt to capture the legendary two-headed pushmi-pullyu as a farewell gift for Doctor Dolittle after he cures their sickness. After three days of persuasion, the shy creature agrees to accompany the Doctor to England.

memes.label: Grand Gorilla
memes.description: A mighty gorilla leader who spoke at the Monkeys' Council and, with the strength of seven horses, placed a memorial stone at the Doctor's farewell feast (009-006, 010-033).

memes.label: Gub-Gub
memes.description: Doctor Dolittle's baby pig, a comically gluttonous and emotional member of the animal household whose appetites and anxieties provide comic relief throughout the African expedition.

memes.label: Jip the Dog
memes.description: Jip is Doctor Dolittle's loyal dog, known for his extraordinary sense of smell, which proves crucial in tracking and rescue operations throughout the African voyage.

memes.label: Jip Tracks the Lost Man
memes.description: After the eagles fail to find the lost fisherman, Jip the dog uses his extraordinary sense of smell to track the man across the ocean by the scent of Black Rappee snuff.

memes.label: John Dolittle
memes.description: John Dolittle, M.D., is the protagonist — a former people's doctor from Puddleby-on-the-Marsh who learns to speak animal languages and becomes the world's first animal-doctor.

memes.label: Jolliginki
memes.description: The fictional African kingdom ruled by a suspicious monarch, where Doctor Dolittle and his animals are imprisoned during their expedition — a land of mud palaces, dense jungles, and political intrigue.

memes.label: Key Relationships
memes.description: An index of the central relationships and bonds in The Story of Doctor Dolittle — the connections between the Doctor and his animals, the allies and opponents they meet in Africa, and the friendships that drive the story.

memes.label: King of the Jolliginki
memes.description: The suspicious monarch of the fictional African kingdom of Jolliginki, who imprisons Doctor Dolittle and his animals out of distrust of white men, and serves as the primary antagonist of the African chapters.

memes.label: Land of the Monkeys
memes.description: A remote region in Africa separated from the Kingdom of Jolliginki by a steep river gorge, home to the monkey population that sought Doctor Dolittle's help during the great monkey sickness. Accessible only by the legendary Bridge of Apes.

memes.label: Land of the White Men
memes.description: The distant homeland of Doctor Dolittle and European civilization, referred to throughout the African narrative as a place of medicine, ships, money, menageries, and all the things the Doctor must eventually return to.

memes.label: Lost in the Jungle
memes.description: While passing through a thick forest in Africa, Doctor Dolittle and his animals become lost for days without Chee-Chee's guidance and accidentally blunder into the King of Jolliginki's back-garden, leading to their recapture.

memes.label: Matthew Mugg
memes.description: The Cat's-meatman of Puddleby-on-the-Marsh, one of Doctor Dolittle's few human friends who remains loyal when others abandon him, and the first to witness the Doctor's transformation into an animal doctor.

memes.label: Medicine and Magic
memes.description: The blend of medical practice and natural magic by which Doctor Dolittle heals animals through understanding their languages and using simple remedies.

memes.label: Money and Wealth
memes.description: The recurring theme of financial hardship and the role of money in Doctor Dolittle's life and adventures.

memes.label: Narrative Span
memes.description: Pages ranked by how many chapters they touch — a measure of narrative breadth, showing which characters, places, and events span the Doctor's full journey.

memes.label: Notable Events
memes.description: A curated index of the most significant events in The Story of Doctor Dolittle — the moments that drive the plot from the Doctor's first language lessons to the triumphant return to Puddleby.

memes.label: Person Reference Index
memes.description: Every person in The Story of Doctor Dolittle, ranked by how often they are referenced across the wiki — the Doctor, his sister, kings, pirates, and the everyday people of Puddleby.

memes.label: Places
memes.description: Index of all locations in The Story of Doctor Dolittle — from the Doctor's home in Puddleby-on-the-Marsh to the kingdoms and wilds of Africa.

memes.label: Polynesia
memes.description: Polynesia is an African Grey Parrot who teaches Doctor Dolittle the language of animals, setting the entire story in motion, and accompanies him on his voyage to Africa as his wisest counselor.

memes.label: Polynesia and the King
memes.description: Polynesia the parrot uses her talent for mimicry to impersonate Doctor Dolittle and frighten the King of the Jolliginki into releasing the Doctor and his animals from the stone dungeon.

memes.label: Polynesia Teaches Animal Language
memes.description: The foundational event in which Polynesia the parrot reveals that animals have their own language and begins teaching Doctor Dolittle to communicate with them, transforming him from a people's doctor into an animal doctor.

memes.label: Prince Bumpo
memes.description: Prince Bumpo is the son of the King of Jolliginki who secretly helps Doctor Dolittle escape from prison in exchange for a promise to change his appearance, and who dreams of fairy-tale princes.

memes.label: Puddleby-on-the-Marsh
memes.description: Puddleby-on-the-Marsh is the small English town where Doctor Dolittle lives and practices medicine, serving as both his home base and the starting point for his adventures.

memes.label: Pushmi-Pullyu
memes.description: A rare and gentle two-headed gazelle-like creature — the rarest animal of the African jungles — presented to Doctor Dolittle by the grateful monkeys as a gift of thanks, and later the star attraction of his traveling show.

memes.label: Quality Leaderboard
memes.description: Quantitative quality ranking of all wiki entries by quality_score — from the richest, most polished pages to those still growing.

memes.label: Queen Ermintrude
memes.description: Queen of Jolliginki, wife of the King and mother of Prince Bumpo, whose sharp eyes exposed Polynesia's trick and triggered the jungle pursuit of Doctor Dolittle.

memes.label: Queen Lioness
memes.description: The forceful queen of the lions who initially refuses to help the Doctor find the lost fisherman but is eventually persuaded by the animals' collective pressure (008-028).

memes.label: Return to Puddleby
memes.description: After months of adventure in Africa and a successful circus tour through the English countryside, Doctor Dolittle finally returns home to Puddleby-on-the-Marsh — a rich man, welcomed by his old horse, the swallows nesting under his eaves, and a town that had long since written him off.

memes.label: Sarah Dolittle
memes.description: Doctor John Dolittle's sister and housekeeper, whose growing frustration with her brother's animal-filled household ultimately leads her to leave Puddleby.

memes.label: Sarah Leaves the Doctor
memes.description: After an escalating argument over the crocodile in the house, Sarah Dolittle packs up her belongings and leaves her brother John Dolittle, abandoning her role as housekeeper and leaving the Doctor alone with his growing animal family.

memes.label: Story Overview
memes.description: A guided overview of The Story of Doctor Dolittle organized by story arc — from Puddleby to Africa and back. Each section links to the key people, animals, places, and events of that part of the journey.

memes.label: The Animals' Market Stall
memes.description: When the Doctor's household runs out of money, his animals set up a vegetable and flower stall outside the garden gate, selling radishes and roses to passing townspeople in an effort to support the household.

memes.label: The Barbary Dragon
memes.description: Doctor Dolittle confronts Ben Ali, the notorious Barbary Dragon pirate, and forces him to abandon his life of piracy with the help of sharks and birds.

memes.label: The Black Prince
memes.description: Prince Bumpo, son of the African King, reads European fairy tales and becomes enchanted with the idea of transforming into a white prince, setting the stage for his fateful meeting with Doctor Dolittle.

memes.label: The Bridge of Apes
memes.description: A living bridge formed by hundreds of monkeys linking their bodies across a deep river gorge to save Doctor Dolittle and his animals from the pursuing army of the King of Jolliginki.

memes.label: The Captain of the Army
memes.description: The commander of the King of Jolliginki's soldiers, whose pursuit of Doctor Dolittle through the jungle is foiled by his comically long ears that catch in a tree — one of the story's most memorable slapstick moments.

memes.label: The Cat's-meatman
memes.description: The Doctor's last human patient in Puddleby, whose stomachache visit and practical suggestion to become an animal-doctor changes the course of John Dolittle's life.

memes.label: The Circus Tour
memes.description: After returning from Africa, Doctor Dolittle travels the countryside with the pushmi-pullyu in a gipsy-wagon, charging sixpence to see the marvelous two-headed animal at country fairs.

memes.label: The Collie Next-Door
memes.description: Jip's offstage rival in Puddleby — a conceited neighborhood collie whom Jip repeatedly mentions and whose imagined envy fuels his bravado during the African adventure.

memes.label: The Crocodile
memes.description: A gentle crocodile who escaped from the circus with a toothache and became one of Doctor Dolittle's permanent animal companions, living in the fishpond at the bottom of the garden.

memes.label: The Crocodile Incident
memes.description: A crocodile with a toothache escapes from the Puddleby circus and takes refuge with Doctor Dolittle, causing a scandal that drives away his human patients.

memes.label: The Fisherman
memes.description: A red-haired fisherman rescued by Doctor Dolittle from the Barbary pirates, whose reunion with his sister and nephew becomes one of the story's most heartwarming episodes.

memes.label: The Fisherman's Nephew
memes.description: A boy of about eight years old, nephew of the red-haired fisherman, discovered locked in the pirates' rum-room by Too-Too the owl and rescued by Doctor Dolittle.

memes.label: The Fisherman's Town
memes.description: A small fishing village at the foot of a rocky mountain where the rescued fisherman's sister lived, and where Doctor Dolittle was celebrated as a hero.

memes.label: The Great Journey
memes.description: Doctor Dolittle and his animals set sail from Puddleby-on-the-Marsh on a six-week voyage to Africa to help the sick monkeys, borrowing a sailor's boat and preparing supplies for the long journey.

memes.label: The Italian Organ-grinder
memes.description: A street performer in Puddleby from whom Doctor Dolittle rescues Chee-Chee the monkey, paying a shilling for the animal's freedom and earning the organ-grinder's lasting resentment.

memes.label: The Leader of the Lions
memes.description: The Doctor confronts and persuades the leader of the lions to help his ailing cub, demonstrating that even the mightiest beasts need a doctor.

memes.label: The Message from Africa
memes.description: A swallow brings an urgent message from Africa — the monkeys are dying of a terrible sickness — prompting Doctor Dolittle to embark on his great journey.

memes.label: The Monkey Sickness
memes.description: Doctor Dolittle confronts a devastating epidemic among the African monkeys, working tirelessly to cure hundreds of sick animals and earning their eternal gratitude.

memes.label: The Monkeys' Council
memes.description: The monkeys of Africa hold a great council to decide what gift to give Doctor Dolittle in gratitude for curing their sickness, ultimately choosing the rarest animal in the world — the pushmi-pullyu.

memes.label: The Monkeys' Farewell
memes.description: A grand farewell party thrown by the monkeys of Africa for Doctor Dolittle, featuring a feast of pineapples and honey, a speech by the Doctor, and a stone monument rolled into place by the Grand Gorilla.

memes.label: The Ocean Gossips
memes.description: Animals across land and sea form an informal intelligence network, using swallows and porpoises to carry messages across vast distances — from Africa to England and across the ocean.

memes.label: The Old Lame Horse
memes.description: A horse of twenty-five years who lived in Doctor Dolittle's stable, entrusted with the house key during the Africa expedition, and served as the quiet guardian of Puddleby.

memes.label: The Pirate Chase
memes.description: The Doctor and his animals are pursued by Barbary pirates during their return voyage from Africa, and must use cunning and the help of two thousand swallows to escape.

memes.label: The Pirates' Treasure
memes.description: Doctor Dolittle discovers the pirates' hidden treasure chamber on their captured ship, though the locked door presents a challenge that requires his ingenuity to overcome.

memes.label: The Plow-Horse
memes.description: A patient plow-horse who came to Doctor Dolittle needing spectacles rather than pills, exemplifying the Doctor's revolutionary approach of listening to animals in their own language.

memes.label: The Porpoises
memes.description: A school of helpful porpoises who assist Doctor Dolittle on his voyages, bearing the self-given title "The Ocean Gossips" and maintaining an information network across the seas.

memes.label: The Rats' Warning
memes.description: Rats aboard the Doctor's ship warn of an impending shipwreck by abandoning the vessel, fulfilling the old sailor's superstition that rats always leave a sinking ship.

memes.label: The Rock
memes.description: A barren rock in the ocean where the Barbary Dragon stranded the red-haired fisherman, later found by Doctor Dolittle and Jip.

memes.label: The Sailor
memes.description: An unnamed but crucial benefactor — a sailor from Puddleby whose baby Doctor Dolittle had cured of measles, who lent the Doctor his boat for the Africa expedition and was later rewarded with two new ships.

memes.label: The Seashore
memes.description: The seashore near Puddleby-on-the-Marsh where Doctor Dolittle borrowed a sailor's boat and departed for Africa, and to which he later returned after his long voyage.

memes.label: The Sharks' Rescue
memes.description: When the Doctor's ship is becalmed and the swallows grow exhausted from towing it, a school of sharks arrives and offers to pull the ship to safety.

memes.label: The Sinking Ship
memes.description: Doctor Dolittle's ship strikes a rock and begins to sink off the African coast, forcing him and his animals to abandon ship and swim for shore.

memes.label: The Six Eagles
memes.description: Six magnificent eagles of different species who answered Doctor Dolittle's call to search the world for the missing fisherman, demonstrating both extraordinary vision and the limits of eyesight alone.

memes.label: The Snuffbox
memes.description: An enormous snuffbox filled with Black Rappee snuff, belonging to the missing fisherman's uncle, which serves as the key scent-trail that enables Jip to track and rescue the lost man.

memes.label: The Storm at Sea
memes.description: The violent storm that strikes Doctor Dolittle's ship during the voyage to Africa, threatening the expedition and testing the animal crew's resourcefulness and courage.

memes.label: The Swallow Messenger
memes.description: A swallow who arrives at Doctor Dolittle's house with news from Africa, then guides the Doctor's ship across the ocean for six weeks, carrying a tiny lantern at night.

memes.label: The Swallows' Escort
memes.description: Millions of swallows gather on the African shore to guide and escort Doctor Dolittle's ship home, later harnessing themselves to the vessel with ropes to outrun pursuing pirates.

memes.label: The Swallows' Rescue
memes.description: Two thousand swallows pull the Doctor's ship to safety when Barbary pirates give chase.

memes.label: The White Mouse
memes.description: One of the white mice who lived in the Doctor's piano, a stowaway who secretly accompanied the Doctor to Africa in his high hat and survived the shipwreck within it.

memes.label: The World of Doctor Dolittle
memes.description: A geographical guide to the world of The Story of Doctor Dolittle — from the Doctor's home in Puddleby-on-the-Marsh to the far shores of Africa and the Barbary Coast.

memes.label: Theodosia
memes.description: The Cat's-meatman's wife and a scholar of Puddleby, whose reading aloud of Doctor Dolittle's cat book to her illiterate husband sets in motion the Doctor's career change to animal medicine.

memes.label: Too-Too
memes.description: Doctor Dolittle's owl, the intellectual of the animal household who serves as accountant and strategic advisor, and whose night-time perception makes him a valuable asset during crises.

memes.label: Too-Too the Listener
memes.description: Too-Too the owl uses his extraordinary hearing to detect a hidden prisoner locked inside a cabin on the pirates' ship, leading to the rescue of a little boy.

memes.label: Travel and Exploration
memes.description: The theme of travel, exploration, and journeying that drives the narrative of Doctor Dolittle's adventures, particularly the African expedition.

memes.label: Voyage and Sailing
memes.description: The nautical theme in Doctor Dolittle's adventures, centered on the sea voyage to Africa aboard a ship crewed by the Doctor and his animal companions.

memes.label: West Country
memes.description: The southwestern region of England where Puddleby-on-the-Marsh lies and where Doctor Dolittle was once celebrated as "the best known doctor" — the homeland against which his global animal fame is measured.
